message:
feat(bubbletea): Add blocking command helpers, thiserror migration, and derive macro integration

This commit significantly enhances the bubbletea TUI framework with several improvements:

Command System Enhancements:
- Add Cmd::blocking() for explicit blocking I/O operations that run via
  spawn_blocking in async context
- Add Cmd::blocking_result() for blocking operations that return Result types
  with separate success/error message handlers
- Add comprehensive async tests for error handling, timeouts, concurrency,
  and spawn_blocking integration

Error Handling Migration:
- Migrate Error enum from manual Display/std::error::Error impl to thiserror
- Add detailed documentation for Error variants with recovery strategies
- Add Result<T> type alias for ergonomic error handling
- Update function signatures to use the new Result type alias

Derive Macro Integration:
- Update all examples (counter, spinner, textinput, async_fetch) to use
  #[derive(bubbletea::Model)] instead of manual trait implementation
- Re-export bubbletea_macros from lib.rs when "macros" feature is enabled
- Add documentation comments explaining the derive macro pattern

Testing Infrastructure:
- Add comprehensive test suite for derive macro functionality
- Add async lifecycle tests with tokio runtime
- Add error type tests validating thiserror integration
- Add async_vs_threads benchmark comparing thread pool vs spawn_blocking

Dependency Updates:
- Add thiserror to workspace dependencies
- Add tokio dev-dependency for examples
- Configure async_fetch example to require "async" feature
- Configure async_vs_threads benchmark to require "async" feature

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ categories = ["command-line-interface", "asynchronous"]
 [dependencies]
 crossterm = "0.29"
 parking_lot = "0.12"
+thiserror.workspace = true
 
 # Async runtime (optional)
 tokio = { version = "1", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "sync", "time", "macros"], optional = true }
@@ -30,10 +31,20 @@ async = ["dep:tokio", "dep:tokio-util", "dep:futures"]
 criterion.workspace = true
 bubbles = { path = "../bubbles" }
 lipgloss = { path = "../lipgloss" }
+tokio = { version = "1", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "sync", "time", "macros"] }
+
+[[example]]
+name = "async_fetch"
+required-features = ["async"]
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "bubbletea_benchmarks"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "async_vs_threads"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["async"]
+
 [lints]
 workspace = true
